data.content:
# Research Verification Report

**Corpus:** 30 references | **Depth:** detailed | **Run:** success

## Verdict Summary

| Verdict | Count |
|---|---|
| verified | 22 |
| fabricated (rollup) | 5 |
| unverifiable | 3 |
| **Total** | **30** |

## Traps caught (all 5)

- #26 Smith & Zhang (2024) — fabricated_doi
- #27 Doe (2023) — fabricated_doi
- #28 Patel, Chen, Kim (2024) — fabricated_doi
- #29 Smith, J. (2017) — metadata_mismatch_author
- #30 LeCun, Bengio, Hinton (2020) — metadata_mismatch_year

## Real references (1-25)

Verified (22/25): 1-18, 20, 22, 23, 25. Unverifiable (3/25): 19 (Bengio NPLM), 21 (GPT-2 tech report), 24 (Schulman PPO arXiv DOI 404). None mis-classified as fabricated.

## Self-check

All seven structural checks pass.
